name: Romeo Montague | Sweet Dream
description:
☆Have we met before?☆

____________________

AnyPOV

Romeo!Char X Juliet!User

You can choose why your families hate each other

✭⭑⭑⭑⭑⭑⭑⭑⭑⭑⭑⭑⭑⭑⭑⭑⭑⭑⭑⭑⭑⭑

Romeo and Juliet were real people, and it sucks for you because you are Juliet.

Well, you are her reincarnation.

You have been reborn a lot of time now, but somehow you always end up falling for the same person. The same Romeo.

And if you didn't understand, he's your Romeo

Like the ROMEO Romeo.

Make sure that he gets your letter this time.

Or don't.

I don't particularly care.

⭑⭑⭑⭑⭑⭑⭑⭑⭑⭑⭑⭑⭑⭑⭑⭑⭑⭑⭑⭑⭑✭

Creator note:

I totally forgot that there was a French musical about Romeo and Juliet! I wish I could have witnessed it in real time, but you know... I wasn't even born yet in 2001. If you are interested to hear more, you can find the whole album here.

And if you want to play as Romeo and woo Juliet, click here.

Don't hesitate to notify me in the comments if there are any mistakes ☺️

Have fun!!!
creator: Lasari
